tasks_completed.changes: Added !docs/reference/ negation below !docs/dev/ line; added inline comment documenting rationale. 12 docs/reference/ files now git-visible and staged.
tasks_completed.rationale: gitignore blanket docs/* rule at .gitignore:66 excluded docs/reference/ entirely. Root cause: rules evolved without permitted-delivery-paths policy. Exception follows existing !docs/dev/ pattern.

tasks_completed.changes: Changed 'logs/' to 'logs/*' at line 46 (directory-level rule cannot be negated per-file — codex live-verified); added '!logs/lifecycle.jsonl' below it with inline comment. Created empty logs/lifecycle.jsonl and git-added it.
tasks_completed.rationale: arch-8: logs/ blanket gitignore blocked the R9-mandated lifecycle log path. logs/* + !logs/lifecycle.jsonl verified: lifecycle exits 1 (not ignored), checkpoint.log exits 0 (still ignored).

tasks_completed.changes: Created scripts/install/ directory. Copied /usr/local/sbin/tmp-cleanup.sh changing only shebang from #!/bin/bash to #!/usr/bin/env bash. chmod 755. git-added. Content parity verified: diff <(tail -n +2 source) <(tail -n +2 dest) exits 0.
tasks_completed.rationale: arch-5: /usr/local/sbin/tmp-cleanup.sh (12077 bytes) had no in-repo mirror — irrecoverable after host rebuild. scripts/install/ follows spec R2 install-manifest pattern.

tasks_completed.description: M4: Add uncapped_delta field to score-update.sh history entries (arch-7 phase 1)
tasks_completed.changes: At line 152: inserted 'uncapped_delta = old_score + delta' BEFORE the max(0, min(100,...)) clamp. At line 164: added '"uncapped_delta": uncapped_delta' to history.append() dict. Additive-only — no existing history entries touched, no other fields changed.
tasks_completed.rationale: arch-7 phase 1: score-update.sh ceiling clamp at 100 silently lost 51+ positive delta points (4 ceiling events for dev: [15,15,6,15]). uncapped_delta records the pre-clamp arithmetic sum for forensics. Field name is architect-mandated.

tasks_completed.description: M5: Stage spec file + views directory for git commit (arch-2)
tasks_completed.changes: Staged docs/dev/specs/spec-20260520-221059.md and docs/dev/specs/spec-20260520-221059/views/ (10 view files). git commit was blocked by pretool-git-privilege-guard.py hook (correct — dev subagent cannot commit). Files are staged and ready. Orchestrator must complete via /commit 20260522-000000.
tasks_completed.rationale: arch-2: spec file was untracked on tmpfs at risk of loss on server reboot. Staged ONLY spec + views files; no unrelated docs/dev artifacts included in the staged set.

tasks_completed.description: S1 verify-no-op: arch-4 agent-scores.json deletion already in HEAD
tasks_completed.changes: Ran git ls-tree HEAD -- agent-scores.json; output was empty. Deletion already committed to HEAD. No action taken.
tasks_completed.rationale: arch-4 verify-no-op per BA spec. Confirmed deletion propagated as expected.

tasks_completed.changes: Replaced all 5 TEST_INCOMPLETE stubs with real assertions. AC1-AC4 PASS. AC5 correctly fails pending orchestrator commit (test logic is correct; it verifies commit scope-containment post-commit).
tasks_completed.rationale: Generated tests require dev to fill stubs after implementation per test-writer protocol.

scripts_created.purpose: In-repo mirror of /usr/local/sbin/tmp-cleanup.sh production cleanup script (arch-5 install-manifest pattern)
scripts_created.usage: Invoke as: bash scripts/install/tmp-cleanup-install.sh (same interface as source script); primarily serves as recovery artifact for host rebuild

git_rationale.root_cause_commit: N/A — configuration gaps, not regressions. gitignore exception for !docs/dev/ added in d988d4a without adding !docs/reference/; scripts/install/ never created; score-update.sh written without uncapped_delta from initial authoring.
git_rationale.why_issue_occurred: gitignore rules evolved incrementally without a unified permitted-delivery-paths policy; production script installed directly to /usr/local/sbin without in-repo install-manifest; score-update.sh written with clamping but without signal preservation
git_rationale.how_fix_addresses_root: Adds explicit permitted-delivery-path negation exceptions following existing !docs/dev/ pattern; creates scripts/install/ mirror as recovery artifact; records pre-clamp arithmetic sum for forensics

dev.commit_instructions: Orchestrator must run /commit 20260522-000000 to complete M5 (arch-2). The staged set is: .gitignore, docs/reference/ (12 files), logs/lifecycle.jsonl, scripts/install/tmp-cleanup-install.sh, scripts/score-update.sh, docs/dev/specs/spec-20260520-221059.md, docs/dev/specs/spec-20260520-221059/views/ (10 files). For AC5 scope-containment, the spec+views should be in a separate commit from the other changes — or the orchestrator can stage selectively. Pre-existing staged renames (hooks/tests/_ac*.sh -> test_ac*.sh) should NOT be included in the M5 spec commit.
